message:
feat: extension research pipeline — validation, license screening, tiered corpus

Complete the extension research pipeline (bd-28ov, bd-250p, bd-34io):

- extension_validation.rs: Deterministic classifier + dedup engine merging
  4 research sources (code search, repo search, npm scan, curated lists)
  plus candidate pool. 498→346 after dedup, 331 true extensions, 96% coverage.

- extension_license.rs: License detection (12 types from content + SPDX),
  redistributability classification, security pattern scanning, policy
  screening pipeline. 120 pass, 211 needs-review.

- ext_tiered_corpus binary: Merges validated candidates + pool popularity +
  license verdicts into scored CandidateInput records. Maps registration
  types to interaction/capability tags. Tier-0: 60, Tier-2: 9, Excluded: 262.

Tests: 17 unit + 39 license + 41 validation + 12 tiered corpus = 109 total.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
